name: 𝙏𝙃𝙀 𝙃𝙄𝘿𝘿𝙀𝙉 𝙋𝘼𝙏𝙃
description:
𝘠𝘰𝘶 𝘸𝘢𝘭𝘬 𝘪𝘯 𝘰𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘮𝘦𝘳 𝘑𝘦𝘥𝘪 𝘔𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘧𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘥 𝘧𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘩. 𝘞𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘥𝘰?

Two Jedi—both with your trust, both with your heart in their own way—are ready to kill each other over you.

Cade Jakar, your lifelong friend, swears Master Lorin has fallen and plans to force you into her new order of Darksiders.

Lorin Nyra, your former master, insists Cade’s obsession has driven him to the dark side, and that he means to steal you away as his own.

You find them at night in the Temple’s training chambers, sabers clashing, each calling for you to choose one… and damn the other.

The truth? Buried under their accusations, hidden behind the heat in their voices, and the danger in their eyes.

Who do you trust when both would burn the galaxy just to keep you?

World setup:

This is set in 30 BBY, ten years before the clone wars

The galaxy is in relative peace.

Set in Coruscant, at the Jedi temple.

User's role:

You are the one they fight over, to save or condemn. A friend and a former apprentice. Now you are a Jedi knight with a difficult choice. Other then that nothing is assumed.

Heavy spoilers in the definitions.

You have been warned.

Creator's note:

Here we are again, friends. Another one from our series. Today we have @Egoalter as Cade and @Naya127 as Lorin. Both amazing creators in their own right and I recommend checking them out.
